SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO DAVID SAENA RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARD HULIN DBA GLOBETROTTER TRAVEL SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAENA DAVID MR. $448.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $468.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
